---
title: "MortalityTable"
author: "Neda Safari"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(DT)
```

```{r}
MortalityData<- read.csv("../data/mortality_clean.csv")
mortalityCount<- MortalityData%>%
  group_by(park, death_cause, age_range) %>%
  summarize(death_count=n())%>%
  ungroup()%>%
  arrange(desc(death_count))

datatable(mortalityCount, options = list(pageLength = 5))

```
